name: Classic Swiss Fondue
recipeIngredient: Pieces of cubed French bread, to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of the fondue pot with cut clove of garlic.
2. Pour in wine and lemon juice and heat gently until bubbling.
3. Reduce the heat to low, and gradually stir in grated cheeses.
4. Continue to heat until cheeses melt, stirring frequently.
5. In a small bowl, blend cornflour smoothly with kirsch.
6. Stir the blended mixture into the cheese mixture.
7. Continue to cook for 2-3 minutes until the mixture is thick and smooth, stirring frequently.
8. Do not allow fondue to boil.
9. Serve with pieces of cubed French bread. (Serves 4-6)
